name: Cyber Security Services
description: Comprehensive enterprise security portfolio including Security Operations Center (SOC) services, managed detection and response (MDR), vulnerability management, identity and access management (IAM), and security consulting. Operated from Telekom Security's European SOCs with threat intelligence from one of the world's largest carrier networks.
positioning: European-sovereign security operations with carrier-scale threat intelligence. Unique visibility into network-level threats through Deutsche Telekom's backbone differentiates from pure-play security vendors.
competitive_moat: Telekom Security SOC infrastructure, carrier-scale threat intelligence, BSI-certified operations
